title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd!
